docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, MANGUBHAI AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, REGGIE CHEROLIS, LENITA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
